title: clerodendrum siphonanthus
intro: Clerodendrum siphonanthus, also known as the butterfly bush or glory bower, is a tropical evergreen shrub native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum siphonanthus include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in various forms, including decoctions and poultices.
